flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Colorado Christian University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.4k → $41.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Colorado Christian University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.4k → $41.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Colorado Christian University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Colorado Christian University rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (47.1% → 58.4%).
